creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to elofu17 from comment #11)
> Still no comments nor any updates to this issue. *sob*
> 
> Is releng/9.3 frozen, or what's the holdup?

I'm sure the secteam could push out a new update in about five minutes which would fix this bug and introduce three new ones.

Or you can wait until they've had time to test it properly.  Your call.
